headline: The week around the world in 20 pictures
snippet: The week around the world in 20 pictures Crisis in the Middle East, Ramadan in Gaza, the Milano Cortina Winter Paralympics and Paris fashion week – the past seven days as captured by the world’s leadi
full_text: The week around the world in 20 pictures Crisis in the Middle East, Ramadan in Gaza, the Milano Cortina Winter Paralympics and Paris fashion week – the past seven days as captured by the world’s leading photojournalists Smoke rises following an explosion in Tehran.
